title: plumeria rubra f. acuminata
intro: Plumeria rubra f. acuminata, also known as the fragrant plumeria or Jamaica frangipani, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Plumeria rubra f. acuminata include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in aromatherapy due to its fragrant flowers.
